contracts.proof: Standard Schema validates the complete issue and query request
repository reads stay under the granted root
code evidence carries citation, revision, freshness, identity, and scope
mutating statements are denied before adapters
database evidence carries citation, query identity, freshness, and read-only scope
log and trace reads use a positive bounded time window
Victoria evidence carries citation, query identity, freshness, and bounded-read scope
expired or over-age evidence cannot reach publication
every published hypothesis evidence id resolves to collected evidence
verifier identity differs from writer identity
verified verdict covers every published evidence id
issues:write authority is checked before adapters
duplicate keys reuse one receipt and conflict keys reject
retry after a lost response returns the stored receipt without a second write
all logic runs through createScope and declared required tag ports with public API only

decision: proposed names for the existing frame target; no frame or denominator change
